query_info.query: select l_returnflag, l_linestatus, sum(l_quantity) as sum_qty, sum(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge, avg(l_quantity) as avg_qty, avg(l_extendedprice) as avg_price, avg(l_discount) as avg_disc, count(*) as count_order from lineitem where l_shipdate <= date '1998-12-01' - interval '80' day group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

query_info.query:
SELECT s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment
FROM part
JOIN partsupp ps1 ON part.p_partkey = ps1.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s1 ON s1.s_suppkey = ps1.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n1 ON s1.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
JOIN region r1 ON n1.n_regionkey = r1.r_regionkey
WHERE part.p_size = 4
  AND part.p_type LIKE '%COPPER'
  AND r1.r_name = 'ASIA'
  AND ps1.ps_supplycost = (
    SELECT MIN(ps2.ps_supplycost)
    FROM partsupp ps2
    JOIN supplier s2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON s2.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r2 ON n2.n_regionkey = r2.r_regionkey
    WHERE ps2.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey AND r2.r_name = 'ASIA'
  )
ORDER BY s_acctbal DESC, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

query_info.query:
SELECT l_orderkey, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
FROM (
  SELECT l_orderkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
  FROM customer
  JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
  JOIN lineitem ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
  WHERE c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY'
    AND o_orderdate < date '1995-03-16'
    AND l_shipdate > date '1995-03-16'
) t
GROUP BY l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
ORDER BY revenue DESC, o_orderdate
LIMIT 10;

query_info.query:
/*+ Set(enable_hashjoin on) Set(enable_parallel_hash on) Set(enable_gathermerge on) Set(enable_sort on) Set(enable_material on) Set(enable_parallel_append on) Set(enable_partition_pruning on) */ SELECT o_orderpriority, count(*) as order_count
FROM orders
WHERE o_orderdate >= date '1995-05-01'
  AND o_orderdate < date '1995-05-01' + interval '3' month
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
      AND lineitem.l_commitdate < lineitem.l_receiptdate
)
GROUP BY o_orderpriority
ORDER BY o_orderpriority;

query_info.query:
SELECT n.n_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM nation n
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey AND r.r_name = 'AFRICA'
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey AND c.c_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC;
